title: Struggle.
content:
My soul is like the oar that momently
    Dies in a desperate stress beneath the wave,
    Then glitters out again and sweeps the sea:
    Each second I'm new-born from some new grave.
meaning:
Sidney Lanier's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Struggle."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
